PRIVATE LESSONS

Sapporo Karate Dojo — Private Special Class

[Sapporo Karate Classes / Private & Small-Group Instruction]
Outside our regular practice days, we offer one-on-one or small-group lessons tailored to the individual, scheduled to fit your personal availability.
Both Headquarters and branch members are welcome to take these lessons, and it is also possible to join from the start as a private-instruction-only member rather than through the regular course.
Content ranges from basics, kata, and applications (bunkai) at beginner through advanced levels, and can also be tailored to a health-focused course or a self-defense-focused course depending on your goals.

Lesson dates and times are arranged in advance by mutual agreement.
We can accommodate sessions any day of the week, Monday through Sunday, between 13:00 and 24:00, though a ¥500 surcharge applies for sessions starting in the morning or after 21:30.
Each private session is held with between 1 and 5 participants, and fees are handled through a ticket system.
Sessions run 30–90 minutes, with each private lesson costing ¥2,000–4,000.

Venue

2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along Tohoku-dori) — Seishinkan Headquarters Dojo
About 9 min (750m) on foot from Shiroishi Subway Station, about 18 min (1.4km) on foot from Tsukisamu-Chuo Subway Station, or about 4 min on foot from the "Sakaedori 1-chome" Chuo Bus stop

For more details, we hold information sessions at the Headquarters upon request. A trial private lesson (¥500) is also available.

Fees for Private Instruction Members

◆ Enrollment fee ¥7,000
◆ Annual fee ¥6,000 (includes insurance, etc./per fiscal year)
◆ Karate gi ¥9,000~ (excl. tax)
◆ Monthly fee ¥1,500 (membership registration fee)

Instructors

Classes are led by the Headquarters Shihan or an instructor.

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
